title: SkillsFuture Career Transition Programme (SCTP)
text:
SkillsFuture Career Transition Programme (SCTP) - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Career Transition Programme (SCTP)
Share link
Industry-oriented training programmes to support mid-career individuals in gaining new, in-demand skills to enhance employability and take on new career opportunities.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
3 to 12 months long industry-oriented courses for skills upgrading
Complemented with career advisory and employment assistance
Apply directly to the training providers from 1 April 2022
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Industry-oriented training programmes, from 3 to 12 months, to support mid-career individuals in gaining new, in-demand skills to enhance employability and transit to new career opportunities

Flexibility of part-time or full-time courses

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents aged 21 years old and above

How to apply?

Interested participants can view the courses by browsing the course directory and apply directly to the training providers from 1 April 2022.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours: 
Mondays to Fridays
8.30 am to 5.30 pm
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 07 Nov 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
